description: Shared clinical/healthcare fields reused across schema bundles.

patient_mrn.name: patient_mrn
patient_mrn.description: Patient Medical Record Number assigned by the ordering facility.

patient_name.name: patient_name
patient_name.description: Full name of the patient (Last, First Middle or First Last format).

provider_npi.name: provider_npi
provider_npi.description: National Provider Identifier (NPI) of the authoring provider — 10-digit numeric; null if not embedded in document.

diagnosis_codes.name: diagnosis_codes
diagnosis_codes.description: Array of ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes (e.g., ["I10", "E11.9"]). Extract all listed diagnosis pointers.

procedure_codes.name: procedure_codes
procedure_codes.description: Array of CPT/HCPCS procedure codes billed (e.g., ["99213", "93000"]). Each entry is a string. Include modifiers as suffix if present (e.g., "99213-25").
